title: Nesopteris thysanostoma
taxonomy: Nesopteris thysanostoma is a plant species classified within the family Marattialean ferns, and more specifically within the genus Nesopteris. It is a member of the class Polypodiopsida, which comprises modern ferns and their closest relatives. Further classification places it within the division Pteridophyta, which includes all vascular plants that reproduce via spores. Nesopteris thysanostoma's classification is also sometimes associated with the order Marattiales and the family Matattaceae. This plant's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the fern group.
constituents: Unfortunately, I couldn't find any information regarding the active constituents of Nesopteris thysanostoma.
